steps.title: State the fossil insight
steps.content: The passage explains that traces in fossils help researchers understand ancient arthropod nervous systems. The Mollisonia symmetrica fossils provide signs of a nerve cord and possibly a synganglion.

steps.title: Reject narrow or invented claims
steps.content: A is only about modern examples, C invents ancient hawk moths and brine shrimp with spines, and D overstates a recommendation. The main idea is fossil evidence informing nervous-system research. The answer is B.
